title: selaginella leonardii
intro: Selaginella leonardii, also known as Jiaogulan, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Jiaogulan include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for overall well-being. Jiaogulan can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
